text:
Once upon a time, there grew a big oak tree.

Every day, birds would perch upon its branches. Children would pretend they were monkeys swinging.

One autumn day, fierce winds shook it. Leaves spun like stars. Stars!

That rain fell gold.

And flowers grew overnight, soft pink.

Oranges blossomed big.

So I think, a tree survives a storm.

I've seen storms.

There's more.

A big owl knows secrets.

Look.

A shadow.

It could swallow me.

Oh!

A mouse.

That's me.

I wink goodnight.

I fly away.

I dream.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
